attributes.content:
## Overview

The Note card gives the workspace a structured home for quick-capture text note. Minimal structure, maximum speed. The digital sticky note.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Note usually evolves through drafting, review, and reuse. The card keeps its core content structured enough to be surfaced in different views, linked from related records, and updated by people or automation without losing provenance.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Document]]** -- Note can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Article]]** -- Article can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Note.
- **[[Prompt Template]]** -- Prompt-driven drafting or summarization can turn Note into a reusable AI-assisted workflow.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Note can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Project]]** -- Note can be grouped under a larger initiative so its work stays visible in context.
- **[[Bookmark]]** -- Bookmark can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Note.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Note as the structured home for quick-capture text note. Minimal structure, maximum speed. The digital sticky note and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Note when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Note stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Note
cardInfo.summary: Quick-capture text note. Minimal structure, maximum speed. The digital sticky note.
